name: Third Coast Auto Group
description_short: Third Coast Auto Group is a credit repair provider based in Austin, Texas. Rated 2.8/5 with 563 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Third Coast Auto Group is a credit repair provider serving clients in Austin, Texas. With 563 Google reviews and a 2.8/5.0 rating, Third Coast Auto Group has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a car dealer, truck dealer, Third Coast Auto Group provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Austin, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Third Coast Auto Group operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Austin, Texas area who are considering Third Coast Auto Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
